# Senior Backend Engineer

Join our platform team building the API and data services that power our
customer-facing product. We move fast, ship often, and own what we build
in production.

## What you'll do

- Design and build REST and GraphQL APIs powering web and mobile clients.
  Own the contract from request to response.
- Model and evolve the data layer: schema design, migrations, query
  performance. Postgres primary, Redis for cache.
- Write production-quality Python (FastAPI). Tests are part of the change,
  not a follow-up.
- Participate in code review — both giving and receiving sharp,
  constructive feedback. Code review is the team's quality bar.
- Take part in the on-call rotation. Respond to incidents, write
  postmortems, drive root-cause fixes.
- Collaborate with frontend engineers on API design. Anticipate the
  client's needs; don't make them work around you.
- Improve observability: structured logs, metrics, traces. If a problem
  takes more than 15 minutes to diagnose in prod, instrument it.

## What you bring

- 5+ years building production backend systems.
- Deep Python experience. Async/await, type hints, modern frameworks.
- Strong SQL and Postgres specifically. Indexes, transactions, isolation
  levels, query plans.
- Comfortable with AWS primitives: ECS or Lambda, RDS, S3, IAM.
- CI/CD discipline: you ship behind feature flags, you write migrations
  that are reversible, you don't break the build.
- Track record of shipping APIs that other teams build on without
  complaining about the contract.

## Stack

Python 3.12, FastAPI, Postgres 15, Redis, AWS (ECS, RDS, S3), GitHub
Actions, Datadog, PagerDuty.
